item.title: 无需训练即可路由：基于可靠性门控的可控比例大语言模型卸载
item.summary: arXiv:2607.20481v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Local-cloud collaboration is a practical way to deploy large language models under resource constraints, but existing methods often rely on trained routers or collaboration-aware finetuning that tie routing behavior to a particular operating regime. In this work, we show
